vocab.example: I try to maintain a brisk pace when walking to the station to get my heart rate up in the morning.

vocab.meaning: khám phá đô thị (đi bộ ngắm nhìn phố phường)
vocab.example: Walking is my favorite mode of urban exploration, as it allows me to observe architectural details I'd otherwise miss.

vocab.meaning: thân thiện với người đi bộ (cơ sở hạ tầng tốt)
vocab.example: Living in a pedestrian-friendly neighborhood has encouraged me to ditch my car for short errands.

vocab.meaning: sự biệt lập/tĩnh lặng một mình
vocab.example: I value the solitude of a long walk, as it provides a rare opportunity for self-reflection in a noisy world.
I enjoy an uninterrupted hour of walking each evening to clear my mind and decompress.

vocab.meaning: bài tập cường độ thấp (ít gây áp lực lên khớp)
vocab.example: Since it is a low-impact exercise, walking is the ideal way for me to stay active without risking injury.

vocab.meaning: đi dạo dọc theo (bờ sông, bãi biển...)
vocab.example: There is nothing more relaxing than a stroll along the riverbank during the golden hour.

vocab.meaning: sự minh mẫn/sáng suốt về tinh thần
vocab.example: A quick walk around the block usually restores my mental clarity when I am struggling with a difficult task.

vocab.meaning: đi làm bằng cách đi bộ
vocab.example: I am fortunate enough to commute on foot, which helps me reach my daily activity targets effortlessly.

vocab.meaning: đi băng qua/đi dọc theo (một khu vực)
vocab.example: I love to traverse the local park trails on weekends to soak up the natural beauty of the changing seasons.
